allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- where winget ---"; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "--- where git ---"; \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($p="C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-HP-Desktop-DiamondDashboard\\ac2eb294-fbfb-4eac-9c5b-e749b2f65f11\\tasks\\bhqebhaec.output"; Get-Content $p -Raw | Select-Object -Last 1 | ForEach-Object { $_ }; Write-Output "==="; \(Get-Content $p\) | Select-String -Pattern "error|warn|fail|compiled|GET /" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 20)
